message:
fix: Validate --outfile and --output-dir arguments and clean up usage

Two issues fixed:

1. Missing argument validation for --outfile and --output-dir:
   - Previously, these options blindly consumed the next argument without
     checking if it was actually a value or another flag
   - Running `csctf --outfile --quiet <url>` would set outfile to "--quiet"
     creating a file literally named "--quiet.md" while --quiet had no effect
   - Now validates that:
     a) A next argument exists (i + 1 < args.length)
     b) It doesn't start with '-' (not a flag)
   - Throws AppError with clear message if validation fails
   - Matches the validation pattern used by --title, --wait-for-selector,
     and --gh-pages-* options for consistency

2. Removed undocumented --format option from usage text:
   - The usage documented `--format both|md|html` but no handler existed
   - The format variable was declared as const 'both' and never modified
   - Functionality is already covered by:
     - --html-only (equivalent to --format html)
     - --md-only (equivalent to --format md)
     - --no-html (disables HTML generation)
   - Removed misleading documentation to prevent user confusion

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -782,12 +782,20 @@ function parseArgs(args: string[]): ParsedArgs {
         if (!Number.isFinite(timeoutMs) || timeoutMs <= 0) timeoutMs = DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS
         break
       case '--outfile':
-        outfile = args[i + 1]
-        i += 1
+        if (i + 1 < args.length && !args[i + 1].startsWith('-')) {
+          outfile = args[i + 1]
+          i += 1
+        } else {
+          throw new AppError('--outfile requires a path')
+        }
         break
       case '--output-dir':
-        outputDir = args[i + 1]
-        i += 1
+        if (i + 1 < args.length && !args[i + 1].startsWith('-')) {
+          outputDir = args[i + 1]
+          i += 1
+        } else {
+          throw new AppError('--output-dir requires a directory path')
+        }
         break
       case '--headful':
         headless = false
@@ -1013,7 +1021,7 @@ function usage(): void {
   console.log(
     [
       `Usage: csctf <chatgpt|gemini|grok|claude-share-url>`,
-      `  [--timeout-ms 60000] [--outfile path|--output-dir dir] [--quiet] [--verbose] [--format both|md|html]`,
+      `  [--timeout-ms 60000] [--outfile path|--output-dir dir] [--quiet] [--verbose]`,
       `  [--headful|--headless] [--stealth] [--use-chrome-profile] [--cdp <endpoint>]`,
       `  [--open] [--copy] [--json] [--title "Custom Title"] [--wait-for-selector "<css>"] [--debug]`,
       `  [--check-updates|--no-check-updates] [--version] [--no-html] [--html-only] [--md-only]`,
